<!-- Thanks for contributing! A short checklist keeps reviews quick. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? One or two sentences is fine. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. Leave blank if there isn't one. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the behaviour change.
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes locally.
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes locally.
- [ ] `uv run mypy src/qvd_mcp` passes locally.
- [ ] Docs touched if user-facing behaviour changed (README, CHANGELOG, examples).
